patches.summary: Adds local Suno workflow and analytics commands beyond the sniffed endpoint spec.
patches.reason: These commands compose reverse-engineered API calls with the generic local SQLite resource store for recipes, spend analysis, lineage, budget caps, sessions, variant picking, evolution, and export bundles.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./..., go vet ./..., go test ./..., and help checks for new command paths pass.
